message:
chore(lockfile): refresh Cargo.lock workspace member versions to 0.2.42

Follow-up to the v0.2.42 tag — workspace.package.version bump propagates
into Cargo.lock the next time cargo touches the tree. Non-functional;
CI builds without `--locked` so this isn't release-blocking, but it
keeps `git status` clean for the multi-agent setup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

-version = "0.2.41"

  "criterion",
